title: VeriFieldNexusVerification
description: Standardized schema for real-world climate asset verification records on Solana

assetType.description: The category of the verified climate asset

gps.description: Geospatial coordinate metadata captured at the field source

accuracy.description: GPS sensor accuracy range in meters

timestamp.description: Captured epoch timestamp in Unix seconds

imageHash.description: SHA-256 cryptographic hash of photographic or telemetry evidence

verificationScore.description: Calculated trust score (0-100) generated by the Verification Trust Engine
